cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is about determining the possible time Betty could have gone to the bakery. Let's break down the information given. First, Betty woke up at 5am. Then, Jessica saw Betty driving to the water park from 5am to 1pm. So during that entire time, Betty was at the water park. Then Susan saw her stretching at a yoga studio from 1pm to 4pm. So after 1pm, she's at yoga. Then Leslie saw her buying a phone from 4pm to 9pm at the electronics store. And the bakery is closed after 10pm. So we need to find a time when Betty wasn't doing any of these activities and the bakery was open. Let me map out her schedule: - 5am to 1pm: Water park (Jessica) - 1pm to 4pm: Yoga studio (Susan) - 4pm to 9pm: Electronics store (Leslie) - After 10pm: Bakery closed So, after 9pm, when Leslie stops seeing her, there's a window until 10pm when the bakery is still open. So from 9pm to 10pm, Betty isn't accounted for, and the bakery is open. Therefore, she could have gone to the bakery during that time. Looking at the options, option D is 9pm to 10pm. Let me check
